HELP_BLOCK_FONT_DESC: Enter a font file (ttf/otf/ttc). It will be automatically renamed to .disabled and takes effect after reboot. Do not perform this on the main font.
HELP_BLOCK_SINGLE_DESC:
Block a single specified symbol range of a font file; the rest remains active.
Use Unicode code points in ascending order. Only ranges present in the font can be processed. A single code point is allowed but the format must stay the same. To restore, enter the filename only — no range needed.
HELP_BLOCK_MULTI_DESC:
Block multiple specified symbol ranges of a font file; the rest remains active.
Use Unicode code points in ascending order. Separate ranges with ";", also in ascending order with minimal overlap. Only ranges present in the font can be processed. To restore, enter the filename only — no range needed.
HELP_BLOCK_GMS_DESC1: Suspends the GMS font service and deletes locally cached font files so that some GAPPs fall back to system fonts. Gmail and Chrome will be force-stopped once during execution. If apps crash after running, reboot your device. Theoretically works on all Android 8+ devices. Fonts may be re-cached after a while and will need to be blocked again.
HELP_BLOCK_GMS_DESC2: Toggling the switch executes immediately without further confirmation. The WebUI version is primarily for when the volume key or touch input in action.sh fails. Exit code 0 is shown on successful completion; the switch then turns off automatically.
GMS_BLOCK_TITLE: Block GMS fonts and font service
TOAST_INPUT_EMPTY: Please enter a font filename meow
LOG_REPEAT_BLOCK: has not been restored yet. Repeated blocking is not allowed!
LOG_RANGE_RESTORE_HINT: [!] To restore a range-blocked font, enter the filename only
LOG_WARN_MAIN_FONT: [!] The selected file ({name}) appears to be a main font. If it is, restore it immediately!
